2026-03-26T08:50:26.9565574Z 
2026-03-26T08:50:26.9565681Z Agent: Now I see two things:
2026-03-26T08:50:26.9565937Z Agent: 
2026-03-26T08:50:26.9567135Z Agent: 1. **`apiRefLink` issue**: The `package.json` has `"apiRefLink": "https://learn.microsoft.com/javascript/api/@azure/arm-network?view=azure-node-preview"` - but this is a stable release (37.0.0). This is a tool issue - the link should use `view=azure-node-latest` or similar, not `view=azure-node-preview` for a stable release.
2026-03-26T08:50:26.9568380Z Agent: 
2026-03-26T08:50:26.9568668Z Agent: 2. **Constructor parameter ordering**: The main branch has:
2026-03-26T08:50:26.9569025Z Agent:    ```
2026-03-26T08:50:26.9569455Z Agent:    constructor(credentials: coreAuth.TokenCredential, subscriptionId: string, options?: ...);
2026-03-26T08:50:26.9570522Z Agent:    constructor(credentials: coreAuth.TokenCredential, options?: ...);
2026-03-26T08:50:26.9570983Z Agent:    ```
2026-03-26T08:50:26.9571204Z Agent:    The new PR has:
2026-03-26T08:50:26.9571446Z Agent:    ```
2026-03-26T08:50:26.9571888Z Agent:    constructor(credential: TokenCredential, options?: NetworkManagementClientOptionalParams);
2026-03-26T08:50:26.9572703Z Agent:    constructor(credential: TokenCredential, subscriptionId: string, options?: NetworkManagementClientOptionalParams);
2026-03-26T08:50:26.9573283Z Agent:    ```
2026-03-26T08:50:26.9573484Z Agent:    
2026-03-26T08:50:26.9574245Z Agent:    The overload ordering has flipped - the PR puts the non-subscriptionId version first instead of second, which could be a breaking change depending on how TypeScript resolves overload matching.
2026-03-26T08:50:26.9575054Z Agent: 
2026-03-26T08:50:26.9576032Z Agent: The parameter name also shifted from `credentials` to `credential`, which is technically a breaking change for named parameter usage, though JavaScript doesn't enforce this at runtime. I need to think through whether this violates the parameter naming guidelines.
